channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Strategic Landpower Dialogue: A Conversation with Major General Lars S. Lervik
item.description: Major General Lars S. Lervik, Chief of the Norwegian Army, joined CSIS to discuss Norwegian defense priorities, lessons learned from the war in Ukraine, Arctic operations, and more.
